/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libformation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libformation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/formation_interfaces/msg/detail/leader_state__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/formation_interfaces/msg/detail/drone_state__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/abdoulaziz/swarm/formation_ws/build/formation_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libformation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
